data.name: Security Guard Sex - Episode 4
data.detailed_description:
A visual novel series with animations about a guy working as a security guard. In this episode, his coffee break is interrupted by two women having sex in the library.

GAME DESCRIPTION

Scarlett is irresistibly drawn to the hot, blonde librarian she sees almost every day.
Unable to control her fantasies any longer, she starts touching herself between the racks of books.
Ms. Hill catches her in the act and decides to join in, helping the young woman with her unfulfilled desires.
Meanwhile, Jeff, the security guard, watches the erotic scene unfold on his monitor, completely flabbergasted.
He sips his coffee, unsure if he should do something or just let it be, since it's his job to keep things in order.

FEATURES

- HD renders and animations
- Video and image gallery

data.short_description: A visual novel series with animations about a guy working as a security guard. In this episode, his coffee break is interrupted by two women having sex in the library.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: 2 GHz Dual Core
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Graphics card supporting DirectX 9.0c
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0c
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
